market_summary: Global markets continue to experience volatility. The art market remains resilient with a focus on 'flight to quality' assets. Today's major update involves a shift in our automated art briefing format to ensure more comprehensive coverage.
art_insights: The market is stabilizing. Recent changes to our briefing protocols now mandate detailed news summaries, deeper market/exhibition insights, and direct links to source material, enhancing data transparency for investors.
key_events: Market volatility: Iran conflict, inflation, Fed higher-for-longer signal
Exhibition spotlight: Frida and Diego (MoMA), Monet/Venice (de Young), New Humans (New Museum)
Protocol Update: New art briefing format mandates detailed news, deeper insights, and source links.
Log update: Medication log completed at 11:00 AM.
last_update_note: Briefing protocol updated to include granular details and source links per 2026-03-21 directive.
